docket_entries.description: DEFAMATION, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF WILSON, CLINT DBA CAZOOMI AS TO DEFENDANT KUYKENDALL, JUSTIN SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR JAN-27-2012 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  NOV-28-2011 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         JAN-12-2012

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAR-26-2012 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 2:00 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE JAN-27-2012 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
MINI MINUTES FOR MAR-26-2012 02:00 PM FOR DEPT 610
SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $350.00 AGAINST CLINT WILSON, FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: MAR-26-2012, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE APR-10-2012. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAR-26-2012 CONTINUED TO JUN-04-2012 AT 2:00 PM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
MINI MINUTES FOR JUN-04-2012 02:00 PM FOR DEPT 610

CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO ENTIRE ACTION BY COURT AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING JUN-04-2012 AT 2:00PM. THIS DISMISSAL IS PURSUANT TO PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST. SANCTIONS PREVIOUSLY ISSUED ARE VACTED. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-05-2012 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Clint Wilson, plaintiff, appearing on his own behalf. At the request of plaintiff, the court ordered the case dismissed without prejudice. Sanctions previously issued are ordered vacated by the court. Proceedings not reported. (610)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-26-2012 Continued To Jun-04-12 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Plaintiff is sanctioned $350.00 for failure to appear. The OSC is re-set to 6/4/2012 at 2:00 PM in Department 610. Proceedings not reported. (610)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-12-2012 Set For Order To Show Cause On Mar-26-12 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 610
